qa_pairs.question: Where can users start to find information about the Cedar and Graham national systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can begin by consulting the technical support page and viewing a series of short webinars that cover the basics of using the Cedar and Graham national systems.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of systems do the webinars cover?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinars cover the basics of how to use the Cedar and Graham national systems.

qa_pairs.question: How long are the short webinars mentioned in the document?
qa_pairs.answer: The short webinars are typically 5-10 minutes each.

qa_pairs.question: Where can the entire series of webinars be accessed?
qa_pairs.answer: The whole series of webinars can be accessed as a playlist on their YouTube site.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the complete webinar playlist?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube playlist for the webinars is located at https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlIsA3IgWjnweFiHlOjBmsF2NTeJ6f5rT.

qa_pairs.question: Can individual webinars be accessed separately?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, individual mini-webinars can be accessed through specific links provided in the document.

qa_pairs.question: What does the 'Getting an account' mini-webinar demonstrate?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Getting an account' mini-webinar shows users how easy it is to get an account.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a PDF for the 'Getting an account' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, slides for the 'Getting an account' webinar are available at Media:Getting_An_Account.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'Getting an account' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'Getting an account' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EtFUvBYaaZE.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of information is covered in the 'General info' mini-webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'General info' mini-webinar provides general information about the national systems.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the slides for the 'General info' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Slides for the 'General info' webinar are available at Media:General_info.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'General info' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'General info' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Judzg9RbFw.

qa_pairs.question: What can one learn from the 'Software environment' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: One can learn more about the software environment of the national systems from the 'Software environment' webinar.

qa_pairs.question: Are there accompanying slides for the 'Software environment' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, slides for the 'Software environment' webinar are available at Media:Summary_of_the_Environment.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'Software environment' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'Software environment' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BteD0aY5zxg.

qa_pairs.question: What topic does the 'File systems' webinar cover?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'File systems' webinar helps users discover the ins and outs of the filesystems on the national systems.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I access the slides for the 'File systems' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Slides for the 'File systems' webinar are available at Media:File_Systems.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'File systems' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'File systems' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=66_WGFpjwew.

qa_pairs.question: What is covered in the 'Managing jobs' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Managing jobs' webinar helps users find out how to manage jobs on the national systems, including basic Slurm commands.

qa_pairs.question: Are slides available for the 'Managing jobs' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, slides for the 'Managing jobs' webinar are available at Media:Managing_jobs.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'Managing jobs' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'Managing jobs' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dfw027j284Q.

qa_pairs.question: What is the benefit of watching the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Watching the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar can help users save time by discovering the most common mistakes to avoid.

qa_pairs.question: Can I find slides for the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, slides for the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar are available at Media:Common_mistakes_to_avoid.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'Common mistakes to avoid' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TOYsh0TPy2U.

qa_pairs.question: What information does the 'Accessing the environment' video provide?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Accessing the environment' video provides everything users need to know about accessing the environment, from logging in to transferring data.

qa_pairs.question: Are there slides for the 'Accessing the environment' video?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, slides for the 'Accessing the environment' video are available at Media:Accessing_CC_Compute_and_Storage_Environment.pdf.

qa_pairs.question: What is the YouTube link for the 'Accessing the environment' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The YouTube link for the 'Accessing the environment' webinar is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VONgiHWc-gE.

qa_pairs.question: Where can one go for additional help or support?
qa_pairs.answer: If more help is needed, one should consult the technical support page.
